summary: Queue System Hardening Full QA Sweep (Iteration 506). All 21 backend tests passed (100%). Frontend UI verified: HottestBattle with Quick Shot button, ProgressiveGeneration showing 'Queued for rendering' status. All queue hardening features verified through code review and API testing.
critical_code_review_comments: VERIFIED: QUEUED state in JobState enum (schemas.py line 41)
VERIFIED: QUEUED not in TERMINAL_STATES or ACTIVE_STATES (correct - it's a waiting state)
VERIFIED: VALID_TRANSITIONS allows QUEUED -> INIT and QUEUED -> FAILED (state_machine.py line 24)
VERIFIED: _drain_queue_for_user uses FIFO ordering with sort=[('created_at', 1)] (pipeline.py line 1345)
VERIFIED: _drain_queue_for_user uses update_one with state='QUEUED' filter to prevent double-promotion (pipeline.py lines 1348-1349)
VERIFIED: get_job_status returns queue_position for QUEUED jobs (pipeline.py lines 1426-1436)
VERIFIED: check_rate_limits does NOT return SLOTS_BUSY (safety.py returns None for concurrent limit)
VERIFIED: detect_abuse uses RATE_LIMIT prefix, not SLOTS_BUSY (safety.py lines 121, 131)
VERIFIED: should_queue_job checks active_count >= MAX_CONCURRENT_JOBS (2) (safety.py line 104)
VERIFIED: create_job deducts credits at creation time, not on promotion (pipeline.py lines 177-192)
VERIFIED: _drain_queue_for_user does NOT deduct credits (no double deduction)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Queue system hardening fully verified. Key features: (1) QUEUED state properly defined in enum, state machine, and transitions. (2) Queue drains on BOTH success (_finalize_job) AND failure (_fail_job_terminal). (3) FIFO ordering guaranteed via created_at ASC sort. (4) No duplicate execution via update_one with state=QUEUED filter. (5) Credits deducted once at creation, not again on promotion. (6) No SLOTS_BUSY error anywhere - uses RATE_LIMIT for abuse prevention. (7) Frontend shows 'Queued for rendering' status in ProgressiveGeneration. (8) HottestBattle shows queued toast when backend returns queued=true.

features_verified.QUEUED_state_in_enum: PASSED - JobState.QUEUED exists, not in TERMINAL_STATES or ACTIVE_STATES
features_verified.QUEUED_in_VALID_TRANSITIONS: PASSED - QUEUED can transition to INIT or FAILED
features_verified.no_SLOTS_BUSY_in_check_rate_limits: PASSED - returns None for concurrent limit
features_verified.credits_deducted_once: PASSED - deducted in create_job, not in _drain_queue_for_user

frontend_ui_verified.Quick_Shot_button: PASSED - 'Quick Shot — 1 Tap Entry' button present
